subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Divine Tree desireth to make mention of one of its fruits, and to gladden it with tidings of its tender mercy and bounty, and to make mention unto it of that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السدره ارادت ان تذکر ثمره من ثمراتها و تبشرها بعنایتها و فضلها و تذکرها بما
